name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsThinking(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsHungry(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "occupied", ![RIGHT(i)] = "occupied"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsEating(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "occupied"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "occupied"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]

(* Invariant: No two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
NoAdjacentEating == \A i \in 1..N :
                     /\ IsEating(i)
                     => forks[LEFT(i)] = "free" /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> {"free", "occupied"}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ size < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ size' = size + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ size > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ size' = size - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* --type invariants
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Server
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}
*)

(* --initialization
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower
*)

(* --next-state relation
Next == /\ state' = state
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ \/ /\ state = Follower
            /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
            /\ votedFor' = votedFor
            /\ state' = Candidate
            /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
            /\ votedFor' = Self
        \/ /\ state = Candidate
            /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
            /\ votedFor' = votedFor
            /\ state' = Leader
        \/ /\ state = Leader
            /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
            /\ votedFor' = votedFor
            /\ state' = Follower
*)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers :
              /\ r \in readers
              /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \notin readers
                  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_CHUNKS
VARIABLES fileChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = FILE_CHUNKS
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ retransmitCount <= MAX_RETRIES
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, fileChunks[retransmitCount + 1])
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ fileChunks' = fileChunks

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES db, snapshot, txState, txStatus, txId, txKeys, txWrites, txReadSet, txWriteSet

Init == /\ db = <<>>
        /\ snapshot = <<>>
        /\ txState = <<>>
        /\ txStatus = <<>>
        /\ txId = <<>>
        /\ txKeys = <<>>
        /\ txWrites = <<>>
        /\ txReadSet = <<>>
        /\ txWriteSet = <<>>

Next == /\ UNCHANGED <<db, snapshot, txState, txStatus, txId, txKeys, txWrites, txReadSet, txWriteSet>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, snapshot, txState, txStatus, txId, txKeys, txWrites, txReadSet, txWriteSet>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ epsilon > 0

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[i])]
        /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Avg(c) == Sum(1..N, c) \div N

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1, ![1] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0, ![1] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node:
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
          \/ \E m \in Node:
              /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![m] = [n \in Node |-> Max(counts[m][n], counts[n][m])]]
          \/ \E m \in Node:
              /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![m] = [n \in Node |-> counts[n][m]]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
